headline: Amended Tax Return Preparation Preparation Checklist — Sacramento
articleBody:
Amended Tax Return Preparation Preparation Checklist for Sacramento Clients

Before your Amended Tax Return Preparation appointment with Reclaim Tax Credit Specialists, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Payroll records
2. Tip reports
3. Tax returns
4. Employee w-2s
5. Credit card statements

Contact Reclaim Tax Credit Specialists at (213) 537-5613 to get started.
